architecture.frontend: Next.js 14 + Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel
architecture.backend: Single Next.js API route (no separate Node service this cycle)
architecture.database: PostgreSQL via Drizzle ORM, hosted on Railway
architecture.infrastructure: Vercel (frontend + API route) + Railway Postgres + Cloudflare DNS

apiContracts.description: Public endpoint called by the landing page form to add an email to the waitlist.

fields: id: uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid()
company_id: uuid not null references companies(id)
created_at: timestamptz not null default now()

risks: security: /api/waitlist is intentionally public; needs rate-limit (e.g. 5 req/min/IP) before launch — flag for security review
vendor-lock: Vercel chosen for speed; revisit when monthly traffic > 1M requests
scaling: not relevant this cycle (validate phase)
